title: Muhammad b. Khalid al-Qasri Revolts at Kiifah in the Name of the 'Abbasids
description: Muhammad b. Khalid al-Qasri Revolts at Kiifah in the Name of the 'Abbasids. Recorded under the year 131 AH (749–750 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 27.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 27
